title: crepis heterotricha
intro: Crepis heterotricha, also known as rough hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Crepis heterotricha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and colds. Crepis heterotricha can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
